title: Batch8 LIP-DATA-002 held-out bridge evaluation

input_bundle.dataset_origin: LIP-DATA-002 curated 8-prompt held-out code task set

interpretation: Held-out retrieval_top1 improved from chance to 0.375, but held-out pair-level generalization is still not robust.
Held-out diagonal margin remains approximately zero and slightly negative.
The bridge transfers some signal to held-out prompts, but generalization remains the main bottleneck.
known_limitations: The held-out evaluation contains only eight latent pairs.
The evaluation is latent-space only and does not evaluate text-level semantic fidelity.
The result does not establish semantic transfer, model-to-model alignment, generalization, or production readiness.
data_policy: No generated eval outputs, checkpoints, shards, bundles, datasets, zips, caches, or run artifacts are committed.
scientific_claim_status: Latent-space diagnostic evaluation only. No semantic transfer, text-level fidelity, model-to-model alignment, or production readiness claim.
